evidence.snippet:
Drone &

products.name: SpecificDesign™
products.descriptor: Design and topology-optimization software for continuous fiber composite parts

evidence.snippet:
### Partner with ARRIS
ARRIS’ applications development team leverages deep expertise in additive manufacturing, composites manufacturing, and product development across industries. This world-class team is equipped with ARRIS’ powerful SpecificDesign™ design and optimization software, and is exclusively focused on helping customers’ product teams create breakthrough products.

products.name: ARRIS | MTO Carbon Fiber Spokes
products.descriptor: Ultralight thermoplastic carbon fiber bicycle spoke family

evidence.snippet:
#### ARRIS | MTO Carbon Fiber Spokes
Much lighter than today’s best metal aero spokes and tuned for unmatched ride feel — explore the next generation of thermoplastic carbon fiber spokes in a growing product series.

products.name: AURORRA By ARRIS Super Insoles
products.descriptor: Carbon fiber thermoplastic composite super insoles for performance and everyday footwear

evidence.snippet:
#### AURORRA By ARRIS Super Insoles
The first legit super insole built with world-class materials. Marathon tech for everyday wear — easing pain from your feet to your knees to your lower back, cutting fatigue and boosting energy.
[![AXA Super Insoles: Learn More](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E)](https://www.aurorra.com/products/super-insoles)

products.name: Additive Molding™
products.descriptor: Patented automated manufacturing process for 3D-aligned continuous fiber thermoplastic composites at scale

evidence.snippet:
Additive Molding™
Ultimate Performance & Scalability
======================================================
ARRIS’ Additive Molding™ is an automated manufacturing technology with new material and design latitudes that expand the possibilities for products across industries. 3D-aligned continuous fiber composite materials are now possible within complex shapes where material composition can change within regions of a single part. Ultimate performance meets ultimate scalability.

products.name: ARRIS | MTO® Carbon Fiber Spokes
products.descriptor: Family of ultralight thermoplastic carbon fiber bicycle spokes in multiple spec variants

evidence.snippet:
ARRIS | MTO® Spokes
===================
Advanced Continuous Fiber Thermoplastics

#### ARRIS | MTO Carbon Fiber Spokes
Much lighter than today’s best metal aero spokes and tuned for unmatched ride feel — explore the next generation of thermoplastic carbon fiber spokes in a growing product series.

unresolved_questions: SpecificDesign™ is described in the corpus as internal design/optimization software used by ARRIS's applications team — it is not explicitly marketed as a standalone product for external sale. Readiness set to unknown pending confirmation of whether it is licensed to customers independently.
NDAA compliance status is unknown for all products; the spokes page mentions 'Not Made In China' and U.S./Taiwan manufacturing but makes no explicit NDAA Section 848/889 claim.
Blue UAS status is unknown for all products; no DIU Blue UAS claims found anywhere in the corpus.
The AURORRA By ARRIS Super Insoles link on arriscomposites.com points to an external domain (aurorra.com) which was not fetched; additional SKU variants (sizes, models) may exist there.

fetch_requests.reason: External product page for AURORRA By ARRIS Super Insoles — would confirm SKU variants, pricing/readiness, and any NDAA/compliance claims.
